product_overview: PricePoint is an AI-driven interactive mind-map web application that guides sellers through either a Pricing Audit (Established Seller) or a Pricing Strategy (New Launcher) flow and produces a three-tier price recommendation plus an investor-grade Premium PDF report.
core_goals: Accurately classify users into Established Seller (Audit) or New Launcher (Strategy) within the first screen and route them to the correct questionnaire.
Ensure comprehensive cost coverage so every pricing output accounts for all relevant cost categories for the product type.
Generate market-grounded recommendations where suggested prices sit within defensible market ranges and include revenue impact modelling.
Convert completed sessions into paid Premium Reports (freemium upsell) with reliable PDF generation, branding, and verification.
Deliver investor-grade Premium Reports that users can present to investors or management with clear methodology, sources, and an audit trail.
Keep session completion high via progressive disclosure, clear prompts, and a responsive mind-map UX.

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Initial entry view where users choose their pricing journey (Optimise Existing Product or Launch New Product) and start the mind-map session.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click "Optimise Existing Product" card -> Mind map loads in Audit mode -> See root classification node asking to confirm selling status
Navigate to / -> Click "Launch New Product" card -> Mind map loads in Strategy mode -> See root classification node asking about prior sales
Navigate to / -> Click "Optimise Existing Product" card -> Loading spinner appears -> Network or resource error shown -> See error message and remain on Landing Page

features.name: Mind Map Visualization
features.description: Interactive flow-chart UI that presents the root journey classification node and expands stage-specific question nodes (Product Classification, Deep Dive by product type, Market Intelligence, Business Goals, Distribution & Legal, Psychological Pricing).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View nodes -> Expand journey nodes -> Click Product Classification node -> Select product type -> Click Product Deep Dive node -> Answer a cost input question -> Pan and zoom canvas -> Complete required nodes -> See in-app three-tier price recommendation and Premium Report preview node

Navigate to / -> View nodes -> Expand journey nodes -> Click Product Classification node -> Begin answering several cost questions -> Refresh browser -> Observe state reset and lost inputs -> See advisory that session state is local-only (src/store/useMindMapStore.ts) and suggestion to sign-in or export before continuing

features.name: Theme Toggle
features.description: Header control to switch the UI between light and dark themes to suit user preference.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click theme toggle button -> Observe UI switches to dark mode -> Click theme toggle button again -> Observe UI switches to light mode
Navigate to / -> Click theme toggle button -> Observe UI switches to dark mode -> Refresh browser -> Observe theme reverted to default due to local-only state persistence

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Initial view to select pricing journey

features.name: Mind Map Visualization
features.description: Interactive flow chart for pricing strategy

features.name: Theme Toggle
features.description: Switch between light and dark mode

known_limitations.issue: State is local only (Zustand), no backend persistence
